name: SanDisk Portable SSD 480GB USB 3.2 Gen 2 Read 520MB/s Portable Drives
description: Save and access your important files and media with the SanDisk 480GB Portable SSD. This portable SSD fits seamlessly into your mobile lifestyle, storage capacity and a 10 Gb/s USB-C 3.2 Gen 2 interface. With read speeds of up to 520 MB/s, you'll be able to access your files quickly.

features.Key Features: Kapasitas : 480 GB | Kecepatan baca : 520 MB/s | Interface : USB 3.2 Gen 2 | Konektor : USB-C | Dimensi : 9.91 x 46.9 x 96.9 mm
features.What's In The Box: 1x SanDisk Portable SSD | 1x USB-C to USB-A Cable | 1x Safety and Warranty Guide
